entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Source of daily activity summary and intraday health data

entities.name: Sleep Tracking Database
entities.context: SQLite schema with sleep_score, minutes_asleep, minutes_in_bed columns

entities.name: Daily Activity Summary
entities.context: Database table aggregating steps, distance, calories, active zone minutes from Fitbit

entities.name: Intraday Activity Samples
entities.context: Database table storing per-timestamp metric samples (steps, distance, etc.)

entities.name: Intraday Heart Rate
entities.context: Database table for per-timestamp heart rate readings

entities.name: Active Zone Minutes
entities.context: Fitbit metric tracking fat burn, cardio, and peak heart rate zones

entities.name: Health Data Pipeline
entities.context: Schema design for ingesting and storing structured health/fitness data with raw JSON payloads

relationships.context: Table stores Fitbit-sourced daily aggregate metrics (steps, calories, active zones)
Granular per-timestamp activity data sourced from Fitbit
Per-timestamp heart rate data sourced from Fitbit
Sleep metrics (score, duration) sourced from Fitbit
AZM broken into fat_burn, cardio, peak stored in daily summary
Sleep table is part of the broader health data schema
